params.amount: Number of outcome tokens to buy (1e18 = 1 token = 1 G$)
params.isYES: True for YES tokens, false for NO tokens

params.question: Human-readable question (e.g., "Will BTC exceed $100k by 2026?")
params.resolver: Address authorised to resolve this market (admin if zero)

params.amount: Number of winning tokens to redeem

voidMarket(uint256).details: Used when resolution is impossible or disputed.

buy(uint256,bool,uint256).notice: Buy YES or NO outcome tokens for a market.

closeMarket(uint256).notice: Close a market after its end time (required before resolution).

createMarket(string,uint256,address).notice: Create a new binary outcome market.

impliedProbabilityYES(uint256).notice: Implied probability of YES winning, in BPS (5000 = 50%)

resolve(uint256,bool).notice: Resolve a market as YES or NO.

voidMarket(uint256).notice: Void a market (return collateral 1:1 to token holders).
